items.title: Transparency data: Birthday Honours 2026: Department for Business and Trade
items.summary: Recipients of the King’s Birthday Honours List 2026, sponsored by the Department for Business and Trade (DBT).

items.title: Notice: General Trade Licence for sanctioned processed oil products
items.summary: The General Trade Licence for sanctioned processed oil products permits certain activities prohibited under the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019.

items.title: Notice: Notice to Importers 2953: Russia import sanctions
items.summary: Import prohibitions in force under the Russia Sanctions Regulations 2019, as amended. It should be read alongside the statutory guidance.

items.title: UK to set end date for imports of Russian diesel and jet fuel via third countries
items.summary: The Government has today confirmed the timeline for phasing in its ban on imports of refined oil derived from Russia, as part of the recently announced package of sanctions to further squeeze Putin’s war machine.

items.title: Guidance: Taking part in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme markets
items.summary: This guidance explains the operation of the UK ETS markets and how to take part in auctions and in trading on the secondary market.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Road fuel prices: 15 June 2026
items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.title: New champion to be appointed for Britain’s mutuals and co-operatives
items.summary: Plans for a new champion for mutuals and co-ops have been unveiled in a speech by the Economic Secretary to the Treasury in Birmingham today.

items.title:
Government welcomes hospitality and tourism sector plans to further strengthen its
safety standards to prevent violence against women and girls
items.summary: At a meeting of leading figures from the UK’s hospitality, tourism and night-time economy sectors, ministers heard the industry’s plans to further bolster safety standards across the industry.

items.title: Eskdalemuir seismic array: revised approach to managing onshore wind turbine interference
items.summary: Proposals for an updated approach to managing onshore wind turbine interference with the Eskdalemuir seismic array.

items.title: Make Work Pay: employment rights for unpaid carers and parents of seriously ill children
items.summary: We are seeking views on the employment rights that are available to people with unpaid caring responsibilities and parents who have a seriously ill child.

items.title: Research: Qualitative research with unpaid carers
items.summary: The Department for Business and Trade (DBT) commissioned research to explore the early impacts of the Carer’s Leave Act 2023.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Research: Undergrounding transmission cables: study of costs of innovative methods
items.summary: A study of innovative methods for undergrounding transmission cables with costs for two methods over distances of 20km and 50km.

items.title: Time off for public duties
items.summary: We are seeking views on how the right to time off work for public duties operates in practice, and on proposed changes to the list of public duties eligible for time off under this legislation.

items.title: Research: Rapid evidence assessment: international electricity networks research best practice
items.summary: Rapid evidence assessment of international best practice in electricity transmission infrastructure delivery.

items.title: Guidance: Designated standards: equipment for explosive atmospheres
items.summary: Notices of publication and a consolidated list for designated standards for equipment for explosive atmospheres.

items.title: Joint Statement:  Secretary of State for Business and Trade of the United Kingdom and Minister for Trade and Investment of New Zealand
items.summary: Ministers from the UK and New Zealand make joint statement on the New Zealand-United Kingdom Free Trade Agreement.

items.title: Policy paper: UK support to Ukraine: factsheet
items.summary: This factsheet summarises how the UK is supporting Ukraine following the Russian invasion.

items.title: Corporate report: Economic Crime and Corporate Transparency Act 2023: third progress report
items.summary: A report on the past 12 months of implementation and operation of Parts 1 to 3 of the Economic Crime and Corporate Transparency Act 2023.

items.title: Corporate report: Time off for public duties review report
items.summary: Report setting out findings from the review of public duties in section 50 of the Employment Rights Act 1996.

items.title: Notice: Using home retrofit scheme data to manage fraud, error and non-compliance: privacy notice
items.summary: How DESNZ will use your personal data collected through energy efficiency and low carbon schemes, and what your rights are.

items.title: Decision: Trafford Power Project: Screening decision, the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) Regulations 2017
items.summary: Screening decision by the Secretary of State for the Trafford Power Project, Carrington, Greater Manchester.

items.title: Strengthening CO2 supply chain resilience: call for evidence
items.summary: This call for evidence seeks views and data to inform development of measures to improve the resilience, security, and sustainability of the UK’s supply of food and medical grade CO2 for usage across important sectors.

items.title: Research: Greenhouse gas reporting: conversion factors 2026
items.summary: These conversion factors enable users to calculate and report greenhouse gas emissions from their UK activities in 2026.

items.title: Official Statistics: Market access barrier quarterly statistics: January to March 2026
items.summary: Headline summary of market access barriers resolved during Quarter 4 (January to March) of the financial year ending 2026.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Energy Trends: UK renewables
items.summary: Data on the UK’s renewables sector, including capacity, electricity generation and liquid biofuels consumption.

items.title: Official Statistics: Heat pump deployment statistics: March 2026
items.summary: Statistical releases on heat pump installations in the United Kingdom.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED): impact of measures data tables 2026
items.summary: Data tables for impact of measures analysis which assess the impact of installing home efficiency measures.

items.title: National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED) data explorer
items.summary: The data explorer allows users to investigate energy consumption comparisons by different property and household characteristics.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED) report: summary of analysis 2026
items.summary: Summary of analysis using the National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework using consumption data from 2005 to 2024.

items.title: Official Statistics: National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED): anonymised data 2026
items.summary: Property level data including gas and electricity consumption from 2005 to 2024, property characteristics and energy efficiency measure installations.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED): consumption data tables 2026
items.summary: Data tables for household consumption data.

items.title: Official Statistics: Market access barrier statistics 2025 to 2026
items.summary: Headline figures on market access barriers reported and resolved for the financial year 2025 to 2026.

items.title: Policy paper: UK-Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) trade deal: conclusion summary
items.summary: The conclusion summary explains the provisions and chapters in the UK-Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) trade deal.

items.title: Employment tribunal: penalty enforcement and naming scheme
items.summary: Ask the Fair Work Agency  to take action if the respondent has not paid your employment tribunal award or Acas settlement.

items.title: Notice: Green Heat Network Fund (GHNF): guidance on how to apply
items.summary: Capital grant support is available for the development of new and existing low-carbon heat networks. This page contains guidance and details of how to apply via Triple Point.

items.title: Notice: Green Heat Network Fund: privacy notice
items.summary: How we will use your personal data when you apply to the Green Heat Network Fund.

items.title: Parminder Kohli appointed Chief Executive Officer of OFI
items.summary: The Business Secretary Peter Kyle has announced the appointment of Parminder Kohli as new Chief Executive Officer of the Office for Investment.

items.title: Policy paper: Advanced Nuclear Technologies
items.summary: Information about Advanced Nuclear Technologies, previously known as Small Modular Reactors.

items.title: Notice: Red Diesel Replacement competition: successful projects
items.summary: Grant funding for projects to develop and demonstrate innovative low carbon technologies for use as alternatives to red diesel on construction, mining and quarrying sites.
